summary: Excellent Bear soundboard recording of a legendary show with crystal‑clear audio and superb performance
review: The reviewer praises this Bear‑captured soundboard tape as an “excellent reproduction” of a concert they attended, highlighting the masterful mic placement and level setting that make the audio crisp and immersive. The show itself is described as outstanding, though no specific songs are called out.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed 5‑star review emphasizes both top‑tier performance and pristine recording; weighting yields a near‑perfect score but confidence is medium due to limited sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, clear sound with superb mic placement and levels; praised as an excellent reproduction of the live experience.
